Okay, anyone else want to have a shot you're up. Yeah, okay Okay, we're running out of the day I'm almost done the last thing I kind of want to I just kind of want to recap some of Stuff we talked about today because again, I don't know I don't know about you guys This is like my favorite topping world internet marketing is such a fun thing and for me My favorite part of it is looking at people's sales processes looking at the lifeline of we looking at the things that Everybody's doing to drive traffic and where you're going to people in fact. I've purchased p90x I've actually bought three times now Because they have a really cool sales process online if you've gone through the process It's really really cool You buy the first product and they up so up so up sell and the way they structure the upsells is really really cool And at the end of their the last step of the other upsell process the last question I asked you is hey, thank you so much for buying our product We're just curious were you buying this because you're trying to lose weight or because you're trying to gain weight The first time I clicked on I'm trying to lose weight clicked on that and boom the next page took me some diet supplements And I'm like that's awesome So I went back and I tried to go back and the page wouldn't wouldn't load again So I bought it again went through the process and this time I clicked on I'm trying to gain weight And boom it gave me all these muscle enhancers and that kind of stuff It was interesting to see just the sales process they went through and I bought it again the third time later Because I wanted to see it again and I hadn't recorded it. So I recorded it at that time So I've got three things of p90x anyone wants to borrow one sometime But that's for me. That's my passion is really looking those kind of I like buying people's products Just to see their process in action because when you look at someone's process You look at people that are doing it right and look at their process and reverse engineer That's how you build a better better sales process for yourself Okay, and you guys I mean if you've gone through the microcontinuity training You know that this is my philosophy is the best ways to design sales processes and take those as maps and models But then take those things and tweak them and change them and figure out better ways to do them Or look at other people other people are doing really really smart things in fact We're launching a whole Wednesday at me with our core management team here. We're launching a whole new Lead gen effort and and it's cool. I took again some of the similar concepts I've been teaching but took some other people I saw a couple other people doing some other stuff I tweaked the process and we built a whole new sales funnel. That's different of anything we've done before We're basically we're driving people To a page we're getting an email phone and Which is you guys seen this before and then here we're taking to a page and we're selling them a webinar And it's a hundred ninety seven dollar webinar And they pay zero dollars for it and after they attend the webinar if they're like if they're happy with it Then we're going to build them the hundred ninety seven dollars. Otherwise they keep it Okay, and then if they go from there and then there's the the actual webinar And what we're doing is I'm I'm actually baking and not many people buying it here because We have a sales floor in the Philippines. I found out about getting by going through people's sales process I learned other people are doing I found that it's florida's Philippines The day when it comes right here and gives me the name email address and phone And they don't buy the product which is going to be the vast majority of people right you're going to get maybe one or two percent conversion So 99 percent of the people who show up at my site are never going to buy this thing Those 99 percent of people I can send the filipino floor They'll call these people on the phone and again now I can sell these people through the phone that way Which makes them a stronger customer and drives the rest of this thing and if from webinar They're going to a different a different way to structure our coaching program Which drives them to a different thing which is just re-changing the whole model for a different lead gen channel based on different concepts Don't think that there's only one way to do it. Okay, I have one or two ways I really like but I'm always developing and figuring out new ways to do it just by looking at other people's products And their businesses and their ideas and trying to figure out different ways to shift the things around to make it more profitable To make more money I'm sure we launched. I'm sure that maybe this part won't work or maybe no one will buy it Or maybe a whole bunch of people buy it, but then on the phone no one's buying it So I need to change this piece or you know people come in here, but everyone's canceling. They don't like the webinar So I got to change the webinar piece of it where they're buying the webinar and they're not buying the coaching out You know, whatever the pieces are and just looking at all the pieces and reconstructing and moving them around And that's really how you how you build your business. Okay, it's not everyone's looking for what's the magic pill How do you go from six figures to seven figures? Okay, this is the process This is the same process I go through every single day. I map out ourselves process. I look at the numbers along the way What can we fix? Hey, right here all these people are leaving. What can we let's put it an exit pop here? Throw an exit pop there. Boom $600,000 extra revenue just like that. What else can we do? This doesn't look like good here. Let's change this piece right here And just coming back to finding looking at your process and changing and tweaking and shifting little things And every single time you see a shift you see one or two things one or two things happen You're gonna make more money. You're gonna make less money. Guess what make less money Go back to the other way if you make more money keep doing it. Okay, and this really it's not rocket science When we did our 12th internet millionaire launch we it was it was the most fun process all these different things we've learned along the way like for example On our sales letter You know different sales processes on sales that we had a headline in a video And then we had an order button all the very single very top of it and it was doing all right But I wasn't very happy with and we started shifting it out and about three days into it We tried a different headline without a video and no no order button till about three fourths the way down the page And our conversion is just shot through the roof went from like I don't know a low one percent up to like a two and a half three percent just by switching one little aspect of this page I was like, holy crap. That's awesome. And then our order process just in our order form We're getting people's credit card information We had a two step order form or step one we asked for shipping information step two we asked for the credit card And all we did is we had a lot of people who were filling out the first page not filling out the second page I thought the only reason why they're not filling out second pages because The credit card, you know, they're they're confused about the offer something So we added one little block of text to um to the to the order page one That basically said on next page you're going to ask for your credit card information That's all we did is told them on next page to get their credit card and the conversion on this page dropped down by like I don't know from like a 70 to like a 60 percent But then the the conversion on this page went from a 3 to like a set or to like a 20 27 percent I think something crazy just by adding a different element right here And I would have never known that was actually going to do anything But again, we had the sales process. We saw something was broken here Crapless try something to throw something against the wall and oh my gosh that worked huge numbers just by little tiny tweaks Okay, so it's not going out and creating a thousand products. It's not going out and creating, you know Huge revolutionary ideas are going to change the entire world. It's creating a sales process Driving traffic tweaking things changing things making little adjustments till gets better and the better it gets The more money you're going to make the more money then you can spend on advertising And the whole thing starts growing and growing and growing Okay, that's how vince james went from zero dollars He told me the story was sitting in his basement with a big pen writing out the sales letter He mailed it out the thing converted great He tweaked a couple things converted even better and as soon as he got the model of the work They started ramping up started growing growing growing buying more media and boom 23 months later had 100 million dollars in sales Um 45 million dollars cash in the bank Which who here like 45 million dollars cash in your bank? I think that'd be pretty cool. Okay, but again, it's not it's not huge changes So make sure when you're building your businesses if you've got them built This is the process to go through if you haven't built them yet just start looking at it Okay, look at all the different pieces like what you can tweak what you can change And that's really how you go from a six-figure business to seven-figure business. It's really that easy having them And again, it comes back to two big things obviously build build the puzzle piece in the middle right and then To the point where you can get your mass traffic and having a big back in in the back You have all those things together it becomes it comes a really fun game You can grow and you can scale and you can keep making a lot of money with it over and over over again Okay, so any questions right now? Just have it all Except papa We just stole them from someone else's site. I think I saw some of those from exit pop you can still are I don't even know What it is But it's one where the little square box pops up and it looks like a warning It's like click here to cancel because it's the most confused If you're as soon as we form my page it pops up and you look at and you're like do I push okay or cancel? And you can't figure out which one and every time you push the wrong one I don't care if you push you okay or cancel at least for me It's always the wrong one and takes the exit pop it drives me crazy, but it works So because it's so it's so counterintuitive to what like your brain thinks like I was together even to my own page I looked at I'm like I don't know if it's okay or cancel I click and I always do the wrong one So and most of the people too and they see the offer and then they're like, oh, this is actually a good deal I'm gonna do I'm gonna do that the other thing.
